About Me

Hello! I'm Amol, a Computer Engineer with **5 years of experience in Azure Cloud Storage Administration** and **2 years of experience in DevOps**. I enjoy building automation, CI/CD pipelines, and scalable cloud infrastructure using modern DevOps tools.
